title: Delhi High Court seeks Arvind Kejriwal's reply to ED's plea against acquittal in PMLA summons case
description: The Delhi High Court on Wednesday issued notice to Arvind Kejriwal on the appeal filed by the Enforcement Directorate (ED) against his acquittal by the trial court for non-compliance with ED' summons in the excise policy case.Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma noted that despite advance service of the petition, no one had appeared for Kejriwal. Therefore, the Court issued notice in the matter and listed the case for further proceedings on April 29. Advocate Zoheb Hossain appeared for ED and said that
